I'm very cutely obsessed with arcane rn, I did almost hit my TV when Kaitlyn got pissed at Vi. Like c'mere we boutta fight, <3.

Also spent two hours cleaning out my closet, two whole bags of stuff to give away <3 also probably gonna redo my room soon cuz why not 🤷‍♂️ I might be slightly broke but I know how to change stuff up. I have to down size my bed anyway because it's to large <3 might get money from that and all the stuff I got.

Anyway, I'll stfu enjoy the bot and give me ideas for the next one 👍
